$meta.note: Full roster of Status Effects (buffs, debuffs, conditions) captured from the wiki index. Per-effect stat modifiers are extracted individually in later batches; entries without `mods` are roster-only pending detail extraction.
$meta.verification: Effects with a `mods` object and no `unverified` flag are transcribed verbatim from the effect's wiki page / Tooltip (0.9.4.x). `unverified:true` entries are kept for completeness but the wiki does not publish their exact modifier values (mostly Hunger/Thirst/Fatigue tier conditions, whose Tooltip pages are stubs) — treat their notes as descriptive only.

effects.note: verbatim: +20% Crit Efficiency, +5% Crit Chance, +10% Weapon Damage; from Potion of Rage, Henbane, War Cry, Cannibalistic Craze
granted to Proselytes on Immolated/Martyr death; +33% Life Drain, +33% Healing Eff, -33% Ability Energy Cost
from Bloodthirst; +9% Life Drain, restores 3% Max HP & Energy/turn
Sanguimage; -26% Bleed Res, -13% Dodge, attackers gain +9% Life Drain
from Seize the Initiative
paired debuff from Seize the Initiative
Husk
one per body part, stacks; -5% Energy Restoration, -30% Healing Eff; -1% body-part condition/turn; no duration (permanent until healed via Rag/Bandage)
+4% Intoxication/turn; duration stacks with itself; can spread & prolong; cured by Antidote / Potion of Purification
+100% Skills/Spells Energy Cost, +35% Fumble, +100% Cooldowns Duration; duration stacks & can self-prolong; removed by stepping into Rain
can't move; -200% Dodge; from Immobilization Chance (bow crits, Nail Down, Bear Trap)
can't act; from Stun Chance, dazing an already-dazed target, or knockback into a wall/obstacle; max 2 turns
can't use abilities; -25% Control/Move Res, -10% Acc, +10% Fumble, +1 Swimming Cost; re-applying Daze to a dazed target applies Stun; max 3 turns
-50% Crit/Counter/Dodge/Block Chance, +50% Fumble & Backfire, -2.5% Block Power Recovery (formerly Clumsy/Clumsiness)
-15% Counter/Dodge/Block, +15% Fumble & Backfire; Stumbling (chance to step randomly when walking); War Cry can apply for 10 turns
well-fed state (from eating above the Fullness threshold); prevents Hunger accumulation while active; lasts ~3.6 turns per % difference, capped at 91. Exact stat bonuses not verified verbatim.
after sleeping; +5 Max Energy, +5% Energy Restoration, +10% Fatigue Res; 150 stacks/hr slept (30/hr if already vigorous), cap 1500, -1 stack/turn; Survival tree adds more effects
-10% Weapon Dmg, -10% Crit Chance, +10% Fumble, -10% Block Chance
accumulates from injuries; +7.5% Fumble, -15% Healing Eff, +10% Damage Taken (scales with Pain level)
applied at Hunger 25% (until 50%). Stat penalties apply but exact values not verified verbatim.
applied at Hunger 50% (until 75%). Stat penalties apply but exact values not verified verbatim.
applied at Hunger 75%; Near Death — Max HP reduced 1% every 4 turns (verbatim); removing the condition restores lost Max HP instantly. Other stat penalties not published on the wiki tooltip.
applied at Thirst 25%. Thirst rises ~1 per 33 turns moving. Exact stat penalties not verified verbatim.
applied at Thirst 50%. Exact stat penalties not verified verbatim.
low Fatigue tier. Exact stat penalties not verified verbatim.
high Fatigue tier; relieved by sleeping. Exact stat penalties not verified verbatim.
fatigue-related. Exact stat penalties not verified verbatim.
from alcohol; reduces Stress, raises Intoxication; overconsumption causes Nausea. Exact stat modifiers not verified verbatim.
after Drunkenness wears off. Exact stat penalties not verified verbatim.
purges Satiety/Fullness & hydration; from overeating, excess alcohol, or toxins. Exact stat modifiers not verified verbatim.
per stack (up to 4): +5% Counter Chance, +5% Block Chance, +5% Dodge Chance, +3.5% Weapon Damage; basic sword attacks reduce stacks but +1 turn duration; only one stance active at a time

effects.wilScale: +0.2*WIL Fire Damage to strikes and shots
effects.note: transformed Seal of Power (Pyromancy): +15% Pyromantic Power, +(0.2*WIL) Fire Dmg to strikes/shots, +3% Miracle Chance, +3% Crit Chance
transformed Seal of Power (Geomancy): +15% Geomantic Power, -10% Damage Taken, +10% Damage Reflection, -5% Backfire Damage Change

effects.wilScale: +0.2*WIL Shock Damage to strikes and shots
effects.note: transformed Seal of Power (Electromancy): +15% Electromantic Power, +(0.2*WIL) Shock Dmg to strikes/shots, -4% Backfire Chance, -4% Fumble Chance

effects.wilScale: +0.1*WIL Arcane Damage to strikes and shots
effects.note: base Magic Mastery seal, 5 turns: +15% Magic Power, +(0.1*WIL) Arcane Dmg to strikes/shots, +1 Bonus Range; casting a school's spell transforms it into that school's Seal (+3 turns, up to 9)
verbatim: +[0.15×missing HP%] Crit Chance, +[0.2×missing HP%] Life Drain, +[0.3×missing HP%] Weapon Damage, +[0.3×missing HP%] Energy Drain; strength scales with missing Health

verbatim (per stack, up to VI): -3% Damage Taken, -5% Abilities Energy Cost, +10% Energy Restoration, +3% Crit Chance, +10% Pain Resistance; III stacks: -1 turn all cooldowns; VI stacks: +4% Max HP if HP<40%

verbatim, 1 turn: +(59+AP)% Accuracy, +(PRC)% Weapon Damage, +1 Range; each enemy within 4 tiles adds +(3×STR)% Knockback, +(3×AGL)% Immobilization, +(3×PRC)% Stagger Chance; removed if not wielding a ranged weapon
verbatim: +10% Healing Efficiency for 1440 turns; from praying at a Shrine (also an immediate Sanity & Morale boost on use); cannot stack with an existing Blessing
verbatim (per stack, up to VI): +6% Weapon Damage, +3% Crit Chance; each hit adds a stack & refreshes the 3-turn duration

per stack: +4% Crit Chance (wiki notes this is a known bug — intended to grant +10% Crit Efficiency). Full per-stack stat list not published verbatim. Only one Tactic active at a time; lasts while enemies are in vision
verbatim (per stack, up to 5, 8 turns): +10% Bodypart Damage, +10% Crit Efficiency, -5% Two-handed Axes Cooldowns Duration; one stack per enemy within 5 tiles on activation

skill grants +100% Dodge Chance for 1 turn, then only the stacked Dodge bonus; +2 turns per dodged attack (cap 15 turns); +1 stack each turn you don't Block/Dodge or on taking damage. Potion of Elusiveness = same effect for up to 15 turns. Exact per-stack Dodge value not published on the wiki.

verbatim (per stack, up to IV, 8 turns): -3% Fumble Chance, +25% Armor Damage, +10% Daze Chance, +10% Stagger Chance; mace stance — basic mace strikes +1 turn duration (up to 12) but -1 stack; one stance at a time

verbatim (per stack, up to IV, 12 turns / 15 with crossbow): +5% Immobilization Chance, +10% Knockback Chance, +10% Bleed Chance, -5% Cooldowns Duration, -5% Skills Energy Cost; ranged stance — one stance at a time
verbatim (live page, per stack up to IV, 10 turns): +4% Crit Chance, +10% Crit Efficiency, +5% Weapon Damage, +12% Bleed Chance; dagger stance — one stance at a time
axe stance. Per-stack values from a 2020 patch note (+30% Bodypart Damage, +3% Crit Chance) — NOT confirmed against the current live page; verify before relying on numbers
staff stance. Per-stack values from a 2020 patch note (+12.5% Block Chance, +15% Block Power) — NOT confirmed against the current live page; verify before relying on numbers

low-Morale/high-Sanity psyche state; triggered by idling — skipping turns, Rest Mode overuse, no enemies in sight. Documented penalty: -25% Bonus Experience (2018 devlog, likely stale). Cured by continuous fighting. Full stat list not published.
psyche state; requires Apathy first. Activation chance rises with lower Health & Morale. Exact stat modifiers not published on the wiki.

psyche state; requires Anxiety first. Activation chance scales with Health, Morale, Hunger, Pain, Thirst & Intoxication — the worse the character feels, the faster it triggers. Exact stat modifiers not published.
